title: How to Use list_documents
description: Searching and listing Frappe documents with filters, field selection, ordering, and response format

title: How to Use create_document
description: Creating Frappe documents including child tables, validate_only mode, submit option, and naming

title: How to Use get_document
description: Retrieving single Frappe documents with full field and child table data

title: How to Use update_document
description: Modifying existing documents — partial updates, child tables, submitted document restrictions

title: How to Use delete_document
description: Permanently removing documents — dependency handling, force mode, submitted document restrictions

title: How to Use submit_document
description: Finalizing draft documents — submittable DocTypes, docstatus workflow, side effects

title: How to Use search_documents
description: Global full-text search across multiple DocTypes — no doctype parameter, comparison with other search tools

title: How to Use search_doctype
description: Searching within a specific DocType using its configured search fields

title: How to Use search_link
description: Autocomplete-style search for Link field values — finding valid values for document creation

title: How to Use get_doctype_info
description: Retrieving DocType metadata — fields, types, required flags, link targets, and permissions

title: How to Use run_database_query
description: SQL queries with analysis_type, validation, table naming conventions, JOINs, and aggregations

title: How to Use generate_report
description: Report workflow — report_list, report_requirements, and generate_report — with common reports by module

title: How to Use run_python_code
description: Sandboxed Python execution — actual available libraries, date handling pitfalls, tools API, security restrictions

title: How to Use run_workflow
description: Executing workflow actions — Submit, Approve, Reject, Cancel — with proper state transitions

title: How to Use analyze_business_data
description: Statistical analysis and data profiling — profile, statistics, trends, quality, correlations

title: How to Use extract_file_content
description: Extracting text from PDFs, OCR on images, parsing spreadsheets, and table extraction

title: How to Use create_dashboard_chart and create_dashboard
description: Creating dashboard charts and dashboards — chart types, aggregations, field requirements, workflow

title: How to Use list_user_dashboards
description: Listing accessible dashboards — filtering by type, checking existing dashboards before creating new ones

title: How to Use search and fetch (Vector Search)
description: AI-powered semantic search and document retrieval — requires vector store, natural language queries, fetch by ID

title: How to Use report_list
description: Discovering available reports by module — part of the report workflow (list → requirements → generate)

title: How to Use report_requirements
description: Getting mandatory filters and valid options for a specific report — part of the report workflow

title: How to Use create_dashboard
description: Creating dashboards that link existing charts — create charts first, then assemble into a dashboard

title: How to Use fetch (Vector Fetch)
description: Retrieving full document content by ID after vector search — uses doctype/name format

title: How to Create Dashboards in Frappe Insights v3
description: Creating workbooks, queries, charts, and dashboards in Frappe Insights v3 — correct doctypes, config schemas, manifest updates, and common pitfalls

title: Manufacturing Analysis
description: Analyze ERPNext manufacturing performance across Work Orders, BOMs, production quantities, material consumption, Job Cards, cycle time, bottlenecks, and quality. Use for production efficiency, work-order status, BOM cost, material variance, throughput, delays, defects, or overall manufacturing analysis.

title: Sales Analysis
description: Analyze ERPNext sales performance using revenue, customers, products, pipeline, territories, and period comparisons. Use for requests to analyze sales, revenue trends, customer concentration, product performance, quotations, orders, invoices, sales teams, or territory results.

title: Purchase Analysis
description: Analyze ERPNext procurement performance, supplier reliability, purchase costs, lead times, pending orders, and inventory implications. Use for purchase analysis, spend analysis, supplier performance, price variance, procurement efficiency, cost reduction, reorder, overstock, or dead-stock requests.

title: HR Analysis
description: Analyze authorized ERPNext HR data covering workforce, departments, attendance, lateness, absence, leave, tenure, hiring, separation, payroll, overtime, and allowances. Use for HR dashboards, workforce analysis, attendance patterns, leave utilization, retention, or payroll cost analysis.

title: CRM Analysis
description: Analyze ERPNext CRM data across Leads, Opportunities, Customers, Communications, Campaigns, Contacts, and sales owners. Use for lead pipeline, conversion, opportunity stages, aging, win/loss, engagement, campaign effectiveness, follow-up, or CRM team-performance analysis.

title: DocType Documentation Generator
description: Generate structured technical and business documentation for a Frappe or ERPNext DocType. Use when asked to explain or document a DocType, its fields, child tables, links, permissions, statuses, workflows, validations, API usage, or common record examples.

title: Data Quality Audit
description: Perform a read-only data-quality audit on a Frappe or ERPNext DocType for completeness, consistency, duplicates, invalid links, anomalies, and business-rule violations. Use for data cleanup assessment, migration readiness, missing-field analysis, duplicate detection, integrity checks, or data-quality reports.

title: Export SAG Skills
description: Export one specific or all published ERPNext SAG Skill records into installable skill archives containing valid SKILL.md files. Use when asked to download, package, back up, migrate, or install SAG Skills from the SAG Skill DocType into Claude, ChatGPT, or Codex.
